description: Migration contract test (fake-knex pattern): barcode column + partial unique index created on up, removed on down
ProductCatalogService create/update round-trips normalized barcode; products REST list ?search= matches by barcode (mocked-db service test)

GTIN normalization: 12-digit UPC-A and its 13-digit zero-padded EAN-13 form normalize identically (iOS/Android divergence pair); non-numeric codes pass through unchanged; uniqueness + lookup use the same function
Integration: duplicate normalized barcode for two products in one tenant rejected by the index; same barcode across tenants allowed
Extraction regression gate: full existing packages/inventory action test suite green after each core extraction (receive, adjust, counts, PO, transfers, units/levels)
Extracted cores callable session-free: receive/adjust cores run with (trx, tenant, userId, input) and produce identical movements/levels as before (behavioral tests at the core level)
receivePoLine core now enforces assertLocationWritable: unscoped tech receiving into another location is rejected (new behavior)
Interaction Zod schemas: create accepts Call-type payload with opportunity/client/contact links; rejects missing type_id/client; list filter schema accepts all documented filters
InteractionService.create delegates to createInteractionWithSideEffects (mocked-db): opportunity last_activity_at update path invoked; list applies filters + pagination
Integration: POST /api/v1/interactions persists tenant-scoped row; GET filters by opportunity_id return it; API key lacking 'interaction' RBAC gets 403; cross-tenant id 404
Integration: POST with opportunity_id updates opportunities.last_activity_at
interaction-types returns union of system (Call/Email/Meeting/Note) + tenant custom types (mocked-db service test asserting both tables queried)

Lookup: single-domain hits return product/unit variants; a code matching both a product barcode and a unit serial returns 'multi' with both domains listed (no silent shadowing); MAC matching is case/separator-insensitive
Lookup no-match returns type='none' with prefix candidates across products and units
Lookup payloads: product variant carries per-location on-hand/available; unit variant carries status/client/warranty (schema-level + service test)
InventoryService reads delegate to FR2a cores with filters passed through (stock levels: location/service/low_stock/search; units: serial/mac/status/location/service/client)
Integration: inventory read routes 403 for users without inventory:read; 403 product-boundary for AlgaDesk tenant (assertProductApiAccess default-deny)
Integration: POST /receipts serialized — serials.length must equal quantity (400), duplicate serial 409 machine-readable, success creates in_stock units + movements + level increment
Integration: POST /adjustments requires reason (400); applies delta; location a tech cannot write returns 403
Integration: count lifecycle over REST — start -> record -> submit transitions status, visible to web actions (shared tables); double-submit rejected
Integration: PO line receive — quantity_received advances, PO status open->partially_received->received, serialized units carry line unit_cost, INVENTORY_PO_RECEIVED published
Integration: transfer receive — destination levels increment, units in_transit->in_stock at destination; non-dispatched transfer 409
Work-queue REST: service delegates to assembleWorkQueue for the API-key user (mocked-db); integration spot-check: docket excludes other users' deals and includes why-sentences
Timeline REST: extracted core returns linked interactions newest-first incl. REST-created ones; cross-tenant 404 (integration)
OpenAPI registry test (house pattern): new interaction/inventory/work-queue/timeline paths present in buildBaseRegistry output

me/capabilities: psa tenant + RBAC -> flags true; AlgaDesk tenant -> false; missing RBAC -> respective flag false (service test with mocked product/RBAC lookups + one integration case); path present in OpenAPI registry
Mobile capabilities store mechanics: fetch on auth + on app-foreground; 404 from old server yields all-false flags; flags exposed via context

Workflow action registration: inventory.get_availability/find_units/adjust_stock/create_purchase_order_draft present with valid Zod schemas + designer metadata (mirror registerOpportunityActionsMetadata test)
inventory.get_availability returns per-location availability; inventory.adjust_stock writes movement with reason via the FR2a core (session-free, run-actor attribution)
inventory.create_purchase_order_draft creates draft PO with lines and numbering
Catalog seed migration contract: upserts all six SO/PO lifecycle events with payload_schema_refs; idempotent re-run (server-unit). SO/PO delete actions publish their DELETED events (package-unit)
Transfer dispatch/receive and count submit/approve publish new events with schema-valid payloads; payload schemas present in workflowEventPayloadSchemas map (three-touch-point check)
adjustStock core crossing reorder point emits INVENTORY_STOCK_LOW; staying above does not; count approval crossing emits too
src/api/inventory.ts unit tests (house pattern: assert client.request call object): correct method/path/query and x-api-key param per function; paginated/success envelope parsing
Scan screen: debounce collapses rapid duplicate reads into one lookup; permission-denied state renders settings link (expo-camera mocked)
Scan result cards render product/unit/multi/none variants from lookup fixtures; actions navigate (product->receive, unit->detail, multi->chooser)
Stock list renders low-stock badge and paginates; product stock detail shows per-location rows
Unit detail screen renders serial/MAC/status/warranty/movements from fixture
Drawer gating: InventoryTab hidden when capabilities.features.inventory=false, shown when true
Serial accumulator: N distinct scans build chip list; duplicate scan rejected (no chip, haptic); manual entry adds; submit payload equals chips
Receive flow serialized: submit blocked until serials count == quantity; non-serialized submits quantity only
Adjust flow requires reason before submit; 403 from API renders no-access state
Count record screen: scan increments matching line, unknown code prompts add-line; submit confirmation fires API call
PO receive: line progress renders received/ordered; serialized line uses accumulator; over-receipt warning when qty exceeds remaining
Transfer receive flow: dispatched list renders; receive confirmation fires API call and removes the transfer from the list
src/api/opportunities.ts + interactions.ts unit tests: method/path/query per function (house call-object pattern); error kinds mapped
Queue screen renders sections + why-sentences from fixture; finishable empty state; row tap navigates with id
Pipeline list renders stage badges + values, search debounces, status filter switches datasets
Deal detail renders next-action card as single primary, contact row, timeline items from fixtures
Drawer gating: OpportunitiesTab hidden when capabilities.features.opportunities=false, shown when true
Complete-action flow: submit disabled until successor action + due date present; success updates next-action card
Log-interaction sheet posts type/title/notes/duration with opportunity+client+contact ids; timeline refetches

Call flow: tel: launch records pending-call context; resume within window shows prompt with elapsed-duration prefill; dismiss logs nothing; save posts Call interaction; resume after window shows nothing
Schedule-follow-up posts to /api/v1/schedules with prefilled title, self-assignment, chosen start/end, and NO work_item_type field (server maps to ad_hoc)
Lose flow requires reason, lost_to only for chose_competitor; Win surfaces close-gate failure message verbatim and shows conversion-on-web note on success
